title: Small Custom Construction Materials Manufacture Looking for Help Setting Up Workflows
excerpt:
I run a small custom construction materials manufacture company. We have been halfway using Monday. I see the capabilities of Monday, but don’t have the time to get it setup the way I envision. 
Looking to hire an expert…

posts.author: sfarris (Sam Farris)
posts.cookedHtml:
I run a small custom construction materials manufacture company. We have been halfway using Monday. I see the capabilities of Monday, but don’t have the time to get it setup the way I envision.

Looking to hire an expert to hear my needs and help me setup our workflow.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sfarris - We would love the opportunity to discuss your business and see how we can be of assistance to get you up and running on monday.com with the perfect solution.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also certified in external integration programs such as make.com to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let me know and I will do my very best to accommodate you personally.

Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sfarris,

We would love to learn about what you do and how you’re currently using monday.com.

Mapping the current state is every bit as important as mapping where you want to be, and we can help you with both.

Please send an email with your availability and time zone to teameasy@easy-mondays.com

We can work with you.

Best,
Emma.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sam, I’ve sent you a message if you are still looking for help.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sfarris

Welcome to the community. This is the place where you will find the expert you are looking to.

My name is Elena, I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, official partner of monday in Australia. We’ve implemented variety of solutions for over 200 clients over the last 4 years. Manufacturing and construction are one of our main niche’s. We build custom monday solutions and also have pre-made ones to purchase. We work with businesses of any size (Small to large)

If you would like to know more or have a demo or the solutions, please book in via this link.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

E

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re Cinapsys, a Platinum Certified monday.com Partner based in Mexico City, and we specialize in helping companies like yours fully leverage the power of monday.com.

Our team is fully bilingual and has extensive experience designing and implementing workflows tailored to unique business requirements.

Please feel free to contact us at info@cinapsys.com, and we can schedule a free consultation to get started.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sfarris

We’ll start by understanding your current processes and the outcomes you’re aiming for, then tailor a Monday.com setup with clear pipelines, automated task assignments, and progress tracking. This setup will ensure seamless collaboration and efficient management across teams, integrating features like custom dashboards and notification automations to minimize delays and manual follow-ups.

Let’s Schedule the call and discuss this in more detail. I look forward to talking to you and your team should they join us.

We can help you with your integrations, implementations, support, improvement, training, and services.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sam,

We would love to help you on this and would like to hear more about how you are wanting to use Monday

Feel free to reach out to us on farioconsulting.com

Cheers,
Harsh

posts.author: ronandreson (Ron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I hope you’re doing well.

I saw your post about needing help with setting up your workflow in Monday.com, and I’d be happy to assist. I can help you customize it to suit your needs and optimize your processes.

I understand that you have a specific vision in mind, and I’m confident that I can bring that vision to life by carefully listening to your requirements and configuring the platform accordingly. Whether it’s task management, automations, or building custom dashboards, I’ll ensure Monday.com works efficiently for your construction materials company.

Please feel free to reach out to discuss your needs in more detail. I’m looking forward to helping you set up a solution that works perfectly for your team.

Best regards,
Ron.

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sam,

Having optimized Monday for several companies, I can help streamline your production workflows and inventory tracking.

I can share some examples of similar setups I have built that might align with your vision.

Would you be open to a quick chat about your specific needs?

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
